message:
test(plan): add transition table completeness and duplicate detection tests

- every_transition_in_table_is_reachable: validates all 46 entries in
  MISSION_LIFECYCLE_TRANSITIONS are accepted by transition_lifecycle()
- invalid_transitions_not_in_table_are_rejected: confirms terminal and
  logically impossible transitions are properly rejected
- transition_table_has_no_duplicates: ensures no (from, via, to) triple
  appears more than once in the table

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
